test_cases.input_summary: Coverage review framework for a story about a national railway strike, to identify fresh angles for a feature piece
test_cases.notes: Search strategy was comprehensive across news databases and social media. Gap-finding questions were sharp — correctly identified that freight and supply chain impacts are typically underreported in passenger-focused coverage.

test_cases.input_summary: Coverage review for a story about a city's new congestion pricing scheme, to support a pitch to an editor
test_cases.notes: Good integration of transport specialist publications alongside general news. The coverage density assessment template was immediately usable. Gap-finding questions helped identify the equity dimension as underreported.

test_cases.input_summary: Coverage review for a mental health crisis among university students, to find an original angle for a long-form magazine piece
test_cases.notes: Correctly identified that most coverage focuses on demand for counselling services while structural issues (academic culture, financial pressure, social media) receive less systematic treatment. Analysis framework was practical.
